personal.name: Aakash Choudhary
personal.title: Mobile Application Developer
personal.subtitle: Flutter & Dart Specialist · Native Android & iOS Developer
personal.tagline: Building scalable cross-platform apps with 4+ years of precision.

about.bio: Results-driven Mobile Developer with 4+ years of experience designing, developing, and deploying cross-platform and native applications across Android, iOS, and desktop. I care deeply about clean architecture, performance, and shipping things that actually work.
highlights: 4+ years of experience
3 companies, 6+ apps shipped
Android · iOS · Flutter
8.2 CGPA — B.Tech CSE

experience.summary: Revamped end-to-end booking & payment flow for 1.7L+ users (3–4K DAU).
highlights: Delivered complete app revamp in 15 days for the 26 Jan release under strict timeline with AI tool adaptation
Built and scaled a support chat system, improving engagement and reducing support friction
Improved payment reliability (JusPay) by resolving critical issues in transaction flow and receipt handling
Implemented A/B testing for booking flow, enabling data-driven UX improvements
Developed installation & router recovery flows, improving onboarding success
Reduced app size from 35MB → 15MB, improving install rate and performance
Resolved ANR/crash issues and optimised performance, improving overall app stability

experience.summary: Delivered 3 key apps across Android, iOS & Flutter Desktop, boosting user engagement 40%.
highlights: Delivered 3 key apps (Android, iOS, Flutter Desktop/Mobile), boosting user engagement 40%
Optimised widget rebuilds with typedef, callbacks & BLoC, improving app speed significantly
Built a custom walkthrough widget, increasing first-time user adoption 25%
Implemented video & PDF watermarking + encryption, cutting unauthorised sharing 70%
Created backend-driven widget builder, shortening release cycles 30%
Enabled native DRM-secure video playback across Android/iOS/macOS with zero lag
Added widget-to-PDF/JPG convertor and seamless sharing, improving app utility
Integrated secure payment gateways, raising in-app course purchases 15%
Built custom iOS views with graphical stats to enhance learner analytics

experience.summary: Led complete app overhaul using Redux + MVC, reducing defects 30%.
highlights: Led complete app overhaul using Redux + MVC, reducing defects 30%
Developed 3–4 modules independently, cutting time-to-market 20%
Integrated Native Views & React website via JS Channels, speeding interactions 25%
Maintained & optimized native Android code, ensuring zero integration failures

projects.title: Vendor Tracker
projects.subtitle: Real-time field task coordination app
projects.description: A real-time user tracking app with Google Maps SDK, dynamic markers, and Appwrite APIs for user/task data handling. Integrated foreground/background location tracking on both Android & iOS.
highlights: Google Maps SDK with dynamic, real-time markers
Foreground & background location tracking (Android + iOS)
BLoC for scalable state management
Appwrite backend for user/task data
Persistent logging for field task coordination

projects.title: Cognix
projects.subtitle: Visual-motor reaction time test game
projects.description: A Flutter-based visual-motor reaction time test game inspired by psychometric assessments used in cognitive science, driver training, and attention evaluation.
highlights: Psychometric assessment-inspired game mechanics
Cross-platform Flutter (Android + iOS)
Custom game engine logic for reaction time measurement
Cognitive science methodology applied to mobile UX
metrics: In review — App Store & Play Store

projects.title: Feature Walkthrough Widget
projects.subtitle: Reusable onboarding overlay library
projects.description: A reusable walkthrough widget using GlobalKey & RenderObject for precise overlay alignment, custom styling, and transitions. Improved onboarding UX and feature discovery across multiple app modules.
highlights: GlobalKey & RenderObject for pixel-perfect overlay positioning
Custom styling and transition support
Easy integration across multiple app modules
Increased first-time user adoption by 25%
